steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Calculations for Petrobras indicators as of 2025-03-31
from decimal import Decimal
# Given values (in BRL)
# Balance sheet latest (2025-03-31)
ativo_total = 1147716000000.0
ativo_circulante = 124853000000.0
caixa_eq = 26960000000.0
aplicacoes_financeiras = 17078000000.0
estoques = 42779000000.0
passivo_circulante = 173828000000.0
fornecedores = 31265000000.0
patrimonio_liq = 397603000000.0
imobilizado = 875273000000.0
# Debt
emp_cur = 66629000000.0
emp_long = 303685000000.0
div_bruta = emp_cur + emp_long
# Disponibilidades (cash + investments)
disponibilidades = caixa_eq + aplicacoes_financeiras
# Net debt
div_liquida = div_bruta - disponibilidades
# Shares outstanding (issued - treasury) from 2024-12-31 composition
total_shares_issued = 13044496930
total_shares_treasury = 155764169
shares_outstanding = total_shares_issued - total_shares_treasury
price = 31.17
market_cap = price * shares_outstanding
# Income statement: use TTM method: annual 2024 + Q1 2025 - Q1 2024
# Revenues
rev_2024 = 490829000000.0
rev_q1_2025 = 123144000000.0
rev_q1_2024 = 117721000000.0
rev_ttm = rev_2024 + rev_q1_2025 - rev_q1_2024
# EBIT
ebit_2024 = 137201000000.0
ebit_q1_2025 = 43040000000.0
ebit_q1_2024 = 44027000000.0
ebit_ttm = ebit_2024 + ebit_q1_2025 - ebit_q1_2024
# Net income (attributable to controlling shareholders) TTM
net_2024_attr = 36606000000.0
net_q1_2025_attr = 35209000000.0
net_q1_2024_attr = 23700000000.0
net_ttm_attr = net_2024_attr + net_q1_2025_attr - net_q1_2024_attr
# Consolidated net income TTM (all shareholders)
net_2024 = 37009000000.0
net_q1_2025 = 35331000000.0
net_q1_2024 = 23810000000.0
net_ttm = net_2024 + net_q1_2025 - net_q1_2024
# Gross profit TTM
gross_2024 = 246462000000.0
gross_q1_2025 = 60709000000.0
gross_q1_2024 = 60701000000.0
gross_ttm = gross_2024 + gross_q1_2025 - gross_q1_2024
# Depreciation TTM (retain sign)
dep_2024 = -67033000000.0
dep_q1_2025 = -18976000000.0
dep_q1_2024 = -16648000000.0
dep_ttm = dep_2024 + dep_q1_2025 - dep_q1_2024
# EBITDA = EBIT + abs(dep_ttm)
ebbitda_ttm = ebit_ttm + abs(dep_ttm)
# Working capital
cap_giro = ativo_circulante - passivo_circulante
# EV
ev = market_cap + div_liquida
# Ratios
p_l = market_cap / net_ttm if net_ttm != 0 else None
p_vp = market_cap / patrimonio_liq if patrimonio_liq != 0 else None
p_ebit = market_cap / ebit_ttm if ebit_ttm != 0 else None
psr = market_cap / rev_ttm if rev_ttm != 0 else None
p_ativos = market_cap / ativo_total if ativo_total != 0 else None
p_cap_giro = market_cap / cap_giro if cap_giro != 0 else None
p_ativ_circ_liq = market_cap / ativo_circulante if ativo_circulante != 0 else None
ev_ebitda = ev / ebbita_ttm if (ebbitda := ebbita_ttm) else None
# Note: variable name mismatch, fix

# Recompute ev_ebitda properly
if ebbita_ttm := ebbeta_ttm if False else None:
    pass
# Let's just use computed ebbida_ttm variable
if ebbida_ttm != 0:
    ev_ebitda = ev / ebbida_ttm
else:
    ev_ebitda = None
# EV / EBIT
ev_ebit = ev / ebit_ttm if ebit_ttm != 0 else None
# EPS LPA: using net_ttm_attr / shares_outstanding
lpa = net_ttm_attr / shares_outstanding
vpa = patrimonio_liq / shares_outstanding
# Margins
marg_bruta = gross_ttm / rev_ttm * 100 if rev_ttm != 0 else None
marg_ebit = ebit_ttm / rev_ttm * 100 if rev_ttm != 0 else None
marg_liquida = net_ttm / rev_ttm * 100 if rev_ttm != 0 else None
# EBIT / Ativo
ebit_over_ativo = ebit_ttm / ativo_total * 100
# ROIC = EBIT / (Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa)
# Use Caixa e Equivalentes de Caixa as 'Caixa'
roic = ebit_ttm / (ativo_total - fornecedores - caixa_eq) * 100
# ROE
roe = net_ttm / patrimonio_liq * 100
# Liquidez Corr
liquidez_corr = ativo_circulante / passivo_circulante
# Div Br / Patrim
divbr_patrim = div_bruta / patrimonio_liq
# Giro Ativos
giro_ativos = rev_ttm / ativo_total

# Prepare results rounded appropriately
from math import isfinite

def r(x,dec=2):
    if x is None:
        return None
    return round(x,dec)

results = {
    'Ativo': r(ativo_total,2),
    'Disponibilidades': r(disponibilidades,2),
    'Ativo Circulante': r(ativo_circulante,2),
    'Dív. Bruta': r(div_bruta,2),
    'Dív. Líquida': r(div_liquida,2),
    'Patrim. LÍq': r(patrimonio_liq,2),
    'Receita Ld (12 meses)': r(rev_ttm,2),
    'EBIT (12 meses)': r(ebit_ttm,2),
    'Lucro Ld (12 meses)': r(net_ttm,2),
    'Receita Ld (3 meses)': r(rev_q1_2025,2),
    'EBIT (3 meses)': r(ebit_q1_2025,2),
    'Lucro Ld (3 meses)': r(net_q1_2025,2),
    'Market Cap': r(market_cap,2),
    'P/L': r(p_l,2) if p_l else None,
    'P/VP': r(p_vp,2) if p_vp else None,
    'P/EBIT': r(p_ebit,2) if p_ebit else None,
    'PSR': r(psr,2) if psr else None,
    'P/Ativos': r(p_ativos,2) if p_ativos else None,
    'P/Cap. Giro': r(p_cap_giro,2) if p_cap_giro else None,
    'P/Ativ Circ Liq': r(p_ativ_circ_liq,2) if p_ativ_circ_liq else None,
    'EV/EBITDA': r(ev_ebitda,2) if ev_ebitda else None,
    'EV/EBIT': r(ev_ebit,2) if ev_ebit else None,
    'LPA': r(lpa,4),
    'VPA': r(vpa,4),
    'Marg. Bruta %': r(marg_bruta,2),
    'Marg. EBIT %': r(marg_ebit,2),
    'Marg. Ld %': r(marg_liquida,2),
    'EBIT / Ativo %': r(ebit_over_ativo,2),
    'ROIC %': r(roic,2),
    'ROE %': r(roe,2),
    'Liquidez Corr': r(liquidez_corr,2),
    'Div Br/ Patrim': r(divbr_patrim,2),
    'Giro Ativos': r(giro_ativos,2)
}

# Print all values
for k,v in results.items():
    print(f"{k}: {v}")

# Also prepare numeric values to return
results
"} }
